name: Underground Prototype Chamber
subtitle: Forge the impossible
introText: Welcome to Underground Prototype Chamber. Forge the impossible. This is where your journey continues.
completionText: You have mastered Underground Prototype Chamber. The Alloy you've gathered here will echo through every room that follows.
guideIntroLine: Deep underground. The prototypes here were never meant to see daylight.

transformationStages.name: Underground Prototype Chamber — Mastered
transformationStages.description: The room at its peak. Underground Prototype Chamber evolves as you progress.
